Sport

Men's Basketball Roster Schedule News Statistics Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

44 Tanner Harrell

  • Height 6-3
  • Weight 177
  • Year Freshman
  • Hometown North Augusta, SC
  • Position G
  • Previous School North Augusta HS
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26: Played in four games and 11 minutes...scored seven points and was 1-3 from three-point range.

HIGH SCHOOL: Attended North Augusta High School in North Augusta, S.C. … Graduated in 2024 … Lettered three years in basketball … Earned Defensive MVP, Most Improved, and Coaches Award … Helped lead his team to the first undefeated season in school history in 2023 and three straight region championships … Inducted into the NAHS Hall of Fame … Honors student

PERSONAL: Born August 31, 2005, in North Augusta, S.C. … Parents are Tony and Casey Harrell … Has three siblings: Anthony, Austin, and Kristin … Plans to major in Kinesiology

FUN FACT: He was inducted into the Hall of Fame at his high school … His brother Austin plays basketball at Columbia College, and his father Tony is the current head coach at North Augusta High School
